case_title: ARCILLA, ANGELO vs. CLARKE, CAROL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCILLA, ANGELO AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, CAROL CLARKE, DAVID DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCILLA, ANGELO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARKE, CAROL CLARKE, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 241 PLYMOUTH AVE, #3, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $18.53 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCILLA, ANGELO
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, CAROL CLARKE, DAVID
NO RESPONSE TO NOTICE; EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS ORDERED DESTROYED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCILLA, ANGELO SERVED NOV-10-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, DAVID
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCILLA, ANGELO SERVED NOV-10-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, CAROL

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $140.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCILLA, ANGELO AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, CAROL CLARKE, DAVID
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, CAROL CLARKE, DAVID
